There was a lonely old owl who lived in an old oak tree. All the other birds would stay away when the sun went down. The old owl wouldnOWLbettssowl.

On a cloudy evening, just owl-sized owlblests worth owllikes.

There was a small, fluffy bat fluttering through.

The owl wouldn't even bat an eye.

Just a little flutter about.

Suddenly... OWLE!

The owl's wing was broken. The bat just flew away some wise old owl.

The next night... oh owls.

A fox!

No.

Well. That.

Just the owl.
